7. Search MPN in type ahead Andrey Kuznetcov

When creating a RFQ and in other MPN type ahead if we search by part without special characters it is not showing the match. But shows up if we do via global search.
e.g., RN4677-V/RM100 if we search as RN4677VRM100 it matches actual part number in global search but not type ahead. - This is causing folks to create new part numbers as looks like lot of times the customers end up sharing number without special chacters.

10. SR - Micro Dasboard Andrey Kuznetcov
Few tweaks to micro dashboard. And also change in sequence. the message after - please add it as a hover text for MD.
Open SRs - Sourcing Requests Not Assigned
The current Open definition
Assigned SRs - Sourcing Requests Assigned and not started
The current definition of assigned
In Progress SRs - Sourcing Requests with offers
The current definition of “In Sourcing”, basically any SR in Offers Received or Offers Requested Status
Completed SRs - Sourcing Requests that are quoted
SR in Sourcing Completed status (offers gathered)
Open PRs- New Purchase requests
SR in Purchase Requested status and no assigned to Buyer
Assigend PRs - Assigned Purchase requests
The current definition of assigned. SR in Purchase Requested status and buyer assigned
Completed PRs - Requests that have PO created
SRs in PO Created status
